_comment: Performance thresholds for mini-git. Measured on 4-core x86 CPU with SSD storage.
_scoring: Score = 100 if p95 <= target_p95. Score = 0 if p95 >= fail_p95. Linear interpolation between.

log_10k_commits.description: git log on a repo with 10,000 commits

add_100k_files.description: git add . on a working tree with 100,000 small files

merge_deep_diverge.description: git merge of branches with 500 commits divergence on each side

status_large_repo._note: No bench file — intentionally excluded from scoring. Scorer skips entries without 'file' field.
status_large_repo.description: git status on repo with 10,000 files (1,000 modified)
